$comment: Year 5 (Hebrews + 1+2 Peter) printed back-list tier definitions. Transcribed from the QuizMeet booklet on 2026-05-11. Club 150 is the basic 150-verse cut and lives in the deck file already (sourced from the Anki .colpkg). Club 300 is the additional 150-verse cut not yet authored in Anki — captured here so tools/expand_deck.py can seed the deck file before the next colpkg refresh. The full year-5 material is every verse of every chapter that contains at least one Club 150 or 300 verse; for Hebrews and 1+2 Peter that's every chapter of every book (469 verses total).
